IN1.observed: Running validate-graph-schema.py directly on the real initialized r3-init graph store returned exit 0 with valid=true, violations=[], missing_sections=[] (0 missing required keys); a graph placed outside the authority root was rejected exit 2 (fail-closed). The two pytest schema-gate nodes passed, covering required-key and invalid-authority rejection paths.

OUT1.observed: 2026-07-21 再取得 (r17)。dev-graph 未初期化の git repository (--empty fixture) に対し init を 2 回とも Skill リテラル呼び出しで実行。Live-trial verdict overall=PASS, tier=live, downgrade_reason=null, transcript_layer=jsonl, nudge=0/gate=0。6 content root 生成・graph store 生成・C11 exit0・2 回目の全ファイル sha256 一致 (冪等)・init receipt 実在を観測。本 issue の修正点である「init が出力する config の repo-config.schema.json 適合」も config_schema_valid=true として実走で確認した。独立 evaluator が対象 repo を自ら ls / jsonschema 検証して PASS。

OUT2.observed: The scaffolded .dev-graph/templates set is name-identical (21 entries: template-contract.json, common-frontmatter, issue/task/specification/document/feature kinds, architecture + 5 subtypes, api-contract, system-phase/task specs, example configs, README) to the plugin templates source; the OUT2 acceptance-clause contract test passed.

OUT3.observed: r3-init config.json stores only repository-relative content_roots/local_state paths (grep for /Users/ returned 0), with path_policy.allow_outside_repository=false and follow_content_symlinks_outside_repository=false. The C24 containment and resolve pytest nodes passed, confirming cross-repo read/write, project-root mismatch and broken/escaping content symlinks are fail-closed.

OUT4.observed: config.github.enabled=false while retaining owner_login=example, project_number=1, alias/auto_add and field_mappings (Status/Priority single_select option maps). A grep for token/node_id/item_id/project node IDs returned no matches; the OUT4 acceptance-clause contract test passed.

OUT5.observed: r3-init ran with --hook-source plugin: config.claude_hooks.source=plugin with project_plugin_link=.claude/dev-graph-plugin and no project-fallback .claude/settings.json was written (effective plugin hook present suppresses fallback, 0 double registration). The OUT5 acceptance clause (project-fallback / 二重登録0件 / rollback markers) and the C25 lifecycle-hook contract pytest passed.
